programme.title: Diaries Of An Eccentric Family
programme.desc: Abu Samel continues his efforts to fend off the problems caused by his family and neighbors, while rooftop gatherings give rise to new schemes and embarrassing situations unfold at the perfume shop. Reem Abdullah, Majed Mutrib Fawwaz.

programme.title: The Final Word
programme.desc: Shedding light on prominent issues facing Saudi society and exploring its recent transformations through comedy and satire. Mohamed Al Essa, Mohamed Al Qass.

programme.title: Ramez and The Ultimate Level
programme.desc: Ramez Galal returns with a new set of pranks for Ramadan this year, where he hosts a group of entertainment and sports stars to put them through difficult challenges that test their composure. Ramez Galal.

programme.title: Malek Bel Tawila
programme.desc: Technology In a short, entertaining presentation of just a few minutes, Malik Al Rouqi narrates the stories of many influential figures in human history and the most prominent events throughout time easily and enjoyably. Malik El-Rouky, Malek Al Rouqi.

programme.title: In The Footsteps Of The Prophet
programme.desc: A group of children journeys to the Two Holy Mosques and sacred sites to discover key moments in the life of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ during Ramadan and Hajj, experiencing his story firsthand. Jawad Al Swisry.

programme.title: Kingdom Trail
programme.desc: Travels Driving across the Kingdom, Bassam Al-Fifi travels between its cities and villages, uncovering the stories of its people and the beauty of its landscapes in a journey filled with adventure and spontaneous encounters. Bassam Al Faifi.

programme.title: Our Breakfast Is Unique
programme.desc: Chef Omar Al Watban presents a variety of Ramadan Iftar recipes every day, clearly and simply explaining the ingredients and preparation steps for viewers. Omar Al Watban.

programme.title: Hide And Seek
programme.desc: In the 1970s, Wedad, a blind mother, struggles as her daughters try to take advantage of her vulnerability, exposing deep family conflicts, societal pressures, and the traditions and norms of their community. Huda Hussien, Mahmoud Boushehri.

programme.title: Al Aasha Street
programme.desc: Stability seems to have returned to Al Aasha Street after turbulent clashes driven by love, ambition, and rebellion, yet the calm only precedes a fiercer conflict, sparked by a return that will reshape power and test every bond. Elham Ali, Aixa Kay.

programme.title: Kahilan
programme.desc: In Najd, where tribal traditions shape destiny, two horsemen of the same blood and ambition face off, as conspiracies unfold, loyalties are tested, and a forbidden love deepens the stakes of their rivalry. Mutrib Fawaz, Bashir Al Ghoneim.

programme.title: Release
programme.desc: Wrongly accused of murdering his wife, Abbas Al Rayes is sentenced to fifteen years in prison. After his release, Abbas is consumed by a thirst for revenge and a desire for salvation. Amr Saad, Hatem Salah.

programme.title: Our Club
programme.desc: Debate An interactive space where fans share their passion for Saudi football by discussing league matches, talking about their favorite clubs, and exploring the history and meaning of championships. Abd Al Rahman Al Hamidy, Abd Al Rahman Al Hamidy.

programme.title: Hide And Seek
programme.desc: In the 1970s, Wedad, a blind mother, struggles as her daughters try to take advantage of her vulnerability, exposing deep family conflicts, societal pressures, and the traditions and norms of their community. Huda Hussien, Mahmoud Boushehri.

programme.desc: Desperate to afford her son's treatment for a severe illness, widow Sarah turns to her manager, Zein, who agrees to help on one condition: she must spend one night with him. programme.desc: Deprived of her mother's love and overshadowed by her privileged brother, Seniha, trapped in her own home, seethes with resentment until long-suppressed jealousy drives her toward a breaking point that could shatter their wealthy family's facade. Ozgu Namal, Selahattin Pasali.

programme.title: The Fall Of The King
programme.desc: Kenan Baran, a wealthy and narcissist businessman, leads a secretive double life filled with emotional turmoil. However, when the challenges he encounters reach critical turning points, he is compelled to reassess his mindset and reshape his life. Halit Ergenç, Merve Dizdar, Aslihan Gurbuz, Nilperi Sahinkaya, Nalan Kuruçim, Durul Taylan, Yagmur Taylan, Eylem Akin.

programme.title: The Distant City
programme.desc: Alya Albora goes to Mardin from Canada with her son and her late husband's body, to fulfill his final wish and bury him in his hometown. When she tries to return to Canada, however, tribal chief Cihan Albora doesn't let her leave with her son. Ozan Akbaba, Sinem Unsal.

programme.title: The Imposters
programme.desc: The intertwined paths of Kadir and Ertan, a father and son duo of lawyers who often bend the rules to win, and Asya, a young woman struggling to support her family, who finds herself caught in a web of schemes and deceptions. Ali Bilgin, Beste Sultan Kasapogullari.

programme.title: The Price
programme.desc: Desperate to afford her son's treatment for a severe illness, widow Sarah turns to her manager, Zein, who agrees to help on one condition: she must spend one night with him. Bassel Khaiat, Nicola Meawad, Razane Jammal, Sarah Abi Kanaan, Ali Yones, Fekret Qady, Yam Mashhady, Nicolas Mouawad, Sara Abi Kan'an.

programme.title: Together In All Times
programme.desc: Farah faces a difficult situation when her manager asks her to organize the wedding of her ex-boyfriend. Nicolas Mouawad, Pamela Al Kik.

programme.title: The Beautiful And The Bad
programme.desc: Caught in a family locked in an old feud, a young woman seeks her own identity away from their control. She pursues a university education, where she meets a professor who believes destiny is made, not inherited. Humayun Saeed, Sajal Ali.

programme.title: Me Or You
programme.desc: A heartwarming love story unfolds between two complete opposites: an intelligent, book-loving, and academically successful girl with a pragmatic outlook on life and a carefree, easygoing guy who prefers to go with the flow. Fahad Mustafa, Hania Aamir, Emmad Irfani, Bushra Ansari, Jawed Sheikh, Naeema Naeem Butt, Badar Mehmood, Farhat Ishtiaq.

programme.title: Afwaah
programme.desc: An odd chain of events and a coincidental encounter turn the lives of an advertising executive and a rising female politician into fodder for gossip and speculation. Bhumi Pednekar, Nawazuddin Siddiqui, Sharib Hashmi, Sumit Kaul, Sumeet Vyas, Sudhir Mishra, Apurva Dhar Badgaiyan, Shiva Shankar Bajpai.

programme.title: Operation Mayfair
programme.desc: Despite his strenuous efforts, a detective fails to catch a serial killer with his bizarre ways of committing his crimes. He retires from his job. But when another heinous crime occurs, he is forced to return to his career. Jimmy Shergill, Vedieka Dutt, Ankur Bhatia, Hritiqa Chheber, Bryan Lawrence, Sudipto Sarkar, Jay Hayer, Sudipto Sarkar, Anthony Khatchaturian.

programme.title: Pitch To Get Rich
programme.desc: When style and entrepreneurial ambitions meet investors and celebrated industry leaders, it’s a high-stakes game to build the next big fashion label. Malaika Arora, Manish Malhotra.

programme.title: She Looks Great
programme.desc: Priya lives in her family home with her mother and sisters. She suffers in her life and believes that there is no place for love in her, after her lover left her to marry her sister. Nakuul Mehta, Disha Parmar, Amit Singh Thakur, Rohan Kapoor, Alefia Kapadia, Jyoti Tiwari, Ekta Kapoor, Sahir Raza, Reena Aggarwal, Pranveer Singh.

programme.title: Sardar Udham
programme.desc: Indian revolutionary Udham Singh seeks justice for the horrific Jallianwala Bagh massacre, where hundreds were mercilessly killed under the command of Punjab's lieutenant governor, Michael O'Dwyer, by assassinating him in an act of retribution. Vicky Kaushal, Shaun Scott, Stephen Hogan, Amol Parashar, Banita Sandhu, Shoojit Sircar, Shubhendu Bhattacharya, Ritesh Shah.

programme.title: Kanjoos Makkichoos
programme.desc: Jamna Prasad Pandey does his best to send his parents on a pilgrimage to the chaar dhaam yatra even if the people think he is a stingy man. However, things take unexpected turn. Kunal Kemmu, Shweta Tripathi, Piyush Mishra, Alka Amin, Rajiv Gupta, Vipul Mehta, Vipul Mehta.

programme.title: Kanjoos Makkichoos
programme.desc: Jamna Prasad Pandey does his best to send his parents on a pilgrimage to the chaar dhaam yatra even if the people think he is a stingy man. However, things take unexpected turn. Kunal Kemmu, Shweta Tripathi, Piyush Mishra, Alka Amin, Rajiv Gupta, Vipul Mehta, Vipul Mehta.

programme.title: Radd
programme.desc: A complex and challenging dynamic unfolds between the hardworking and responsible Eman, the wealthy Salaar, and Zain, a stable man preparing for marriage. Just as Eman is about to marry Zain, things become complicated, and she falls in love with Salaar. Sheheryar Munawar, Hiba Bukhari.

programme.title: The Sin Of The Daughter
programme.desc: A single mistake by one of his daughters shakes the stability of the entire family, and the father's harshness turns him into a nightmare. The daughters pay the price through marriage, until the mother finds the strength to stand up and protect her family. Elham Al Fadalah, Jamal Al Radhan.

programme.title: Al Jaradiyah Neighborhood
programme.desc: Saqr bin Suleiman's return to Al Jaradiyah seems to promise a peaceful new beginning, but behind his composed demeanor and quiet presence burns an unrelenting desire to avenge the loss of his parents. Mohamed Al Qass, Nirmeen Mohsen.

programme.title: Samir The Lawyer
programme.desc: Lawyer Samir settles other people's disputes in court with ease, but fumbles through the chaos of his own post-divorce life, creating a stream of comedic contradictions between his sharp legal mind and his personal mess. Karim Mahmoud Abdel Aziz, Mohamed Otaka.

programme.title: City Kitchen
programme.desc: A devoted chef's world crumbles when his daughter disappears, and in the frantic search for her, the family is thrown into chaos, exposing buried conflicts and testing the strength of their love and loyalty. Amal Arafa, Maxim Khalil.

programme.title: Devastated
programme.desc: In the 1990s, Kuwait, Aaref, and Dananir grapple with their rebellious children, blinded by wealth and consumed by greed. Caught between the parents' attempts to maintain family stability through love and the children's relentless pursuit of money, the family is on the verge of collapse. Dawood Hussein, Taif.

programme.title: The Sin Of The Daughter
programme.desc: A single mistake by one of his daughters shakes the stability of the entire family, and the father's harshness turns him into a nightmare. programme.title: Our Preacher
programme.desc: Gaber seeks refuge in the distant village of Al Adliyyah, where he is worshipped as the long-awaited figure, but beneath the reverence lies a man on the verge of exposure, haunted by whispers of his own deception. Tim Hassan, Mona Wassef.

Caught between the parents' attempts to maintain family stability through love and the children's relentless pursuit of money, the family is on the verge of collapse. Dawood Hussein, Taif.

programme.title: Al Jaradiyah Neighborhood
programme.desc: Saqr bin Suleiman's return to Al Jaradiyah seems to promise a peaceful new beginning, but behind his composed demeanor and quiet presence burns an unrelenting desire to avenge the loss of his parents. Mohamed Al Qass, Nirmeen Mohsen.

programme.title: The Sin Of The Daughter
programme.desc: A single mistake by one of his daughters shakes the stability of the entire family, and the father's harshness turns him into a nightmare. The daughters pay the price through marriage, until the mother finds the strength to stand up and protect her family. Elham Al Fadalah, Jamal Al Radhan.

programme.title: City Kitchen
programme.desc: A devoted chef's world crumbles when his daughter disappears, and in the frantic search for her, the family is thrown into chaos, exposing buried conflicts and testing the strength of their love and loyalty. Amal Arafa, Maxim Khalil.

programme.title: Samir The Lawyer
programme.desc: Lawyer Samir settles other people's disputes in court with ease, but fumbles through the chaos of his own post-divorce life, creating a stream of comedic contradictions between his sharp legal mind and his personal mess. Karim Mahmoud Abdel Aziz, Mohamed Otaka.

programme.title: Our Preacher
programme.desc: Gaber seeks refuge in the distant village of Al Adliyyah, where he is worshipped as the long-awaited figure, but beneath the reverence lies a man on the verge of exposure, haunted by whispers of his own deception. Tim Hassan, Mona Wassef.

programme.title: Spark
programme.desc: A mysterious young woman enters a household ruled by three rival wives and outdated customs, sparking a chain of events that ignites a full-blown family war and exposes long-hidden secrets. Bakr Khalid, Sulaf Jalil.

programme.title: Release
programme.desc: Wrongly accused of murdering his wife, Abbas Al Rayes is sentenced to fifteen years in prison. After his release, Abbas is consumed by a thirst for revenge and a desire for salvation. Amr Saad, Hatem Salah.

programme.title: Our Preacher
programme.desc: Gaber seeks refuge in the distant village of Al Adliyyah, where he is worshipped as the long-awaited figure, but beneath the reverence lies a man on the verge of exposure, haunted by whispers of his own deception. Tim Hassan, Mona Wassef.

programme.title: Hide And Seek
programme.desc: In the 1970s, Wedad, a blind mother, struggles as her daughters try to take advantage of her vulnerability, exposing deep family conflicts, societal pressures, and the traditions and norms of their community. Huda Hussien, Mahmoud Boushehri.

programme.title: Our Breakfast Is Unique
programme.desc: Chef Omar Al Watban presents a variety of Ramadan Iftar recipes every day, clearly and simply explaining the ingredients and preparation steps for viewers. Omar Al Watban.

programme.title: Win The Millions
programme.desc: Game Offering a great opportunity to win some cash by getting on the phone and answering questions.

programme.title: Ramez and The Ultimate Level
programme.desc: Ramez Galal returns with a new set of pranks for Ramadan this year, where he hosts a group of entertainment and sports stars to put them through difficult challenges that test their composure. Ramez Galal.

programme.title: Sweet And Sour
programme.desc: Returns with a new season that shows the daily lives of Iraqis in a satirical and comedic perspective, highlighting family and social issues, everyday contradictions that people face in every home, and funny situations that reflect societal inconsistencies. Ehsan Dadosh, Ali Jaber.

programme.title: Hamdiya
programme.desc: Poverty-stricken Hamdiya's life gets even more difficult after her mother's death and her father's remarriage.
